candidate_lesson.lesson_text: When the 30-indicator consensus shows conviction but green_matches=0 (no historical analog), treat the signal as UNRELIABLE regardless of live bull/bear tally — historical hit-rate of 0% is a hard veto, not a soft discount.
candidate_lesson.mechanism: The consensus conviction score measures agreement among live indicators, but green_matches counts how many times this exact indicator configuration produced a win historically. A config with 0 historical matches (USDJPY 8/30 bull, conv=67%, green_matches=0, hist_hr=0%; AUDNZD conv=100%, green_matches=0, hist_hr=0%) is an out-of-sample regime the system has never profited from. Institutional flow that drove past instances of this indicator pattern is absent or inverted — high live conviction on a novel config is confirmation bias, not edge.
candidate_lesson.testable_rule: if consensus.green_matches == 0 and consensus.conviction >= 0.60: veto_signal()  # only trade when green_matches >= 1 AND hist_hr > 0.50
candidate_lesson.expected_impact: Removes zero-analog trades (USDJPY, AUDNZD, EURUSD today) that carry no proven edge; expected win-rate lift by pruning ~40% of false-conviction entries, contributing +0.02-0.03 Sharpe by cutting variance drag from untested configs.
candidate_lesson.evidence_from_harvest: Live consensus shows two high-conviction signals (USDJPY conv=67%, AUDNZD conv=100%) with green_matches=0 and hist_hr=0%, versus GBPUSD (green_matches=1, hist_hr=66%) and AUDUSD (green_matches=3, hist_hr=68%) which have proven historical support. Conviction alone does not correlate with historical profitability.

retirement_flag.reason: L8 tightened USDJPY/AUDNZD VIX gate to 13 in a bull market; current regime is UNKNOWN with VIX rising 15.67→16.73 and ROTATION_WARN — the bull-market premise underpinning the gate may no longer hold, so the 13 threshold needs re-validation under a rotation/risk-off regime.

reflection.system_health_note: Zero trades in last 7 days with regime=UNKNOWN and external TradingView showing 0 signals — the system is in a low-confidence CALIBRATING state where consensus conviction is high but historically unvalidated, so gating on green_matches now protects the Sharpe target from untested-regime drawdown.
